{{Quote|Thank the heavens you're safe!!!|Windy Starkiller's mother, to [[Windy Starkiller|her son]]|<ref name="LSW" />}}
The '''mother of [[Windy Starkiller]]''' lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] with her [[Windy Starkiller's father|husband]] and their son. She and her husband sometimes visited the [[Lars homestead/Legends|Lars homestead]].<ref name="LSW" />
